items.title: FIA confirm hearing date for Alpine appeal against Gasly Monaco penalties

items.summary: ARSENAL Under-21s boss Max Porter has left the club after nine years with the Gunners. Porter, 38, has left to start a new role as Assistant Manager at Stoke City. items.title: Fifa working to resolve revoked Iran tickets
items.summary: Fifa has said it is working to "maximise opportunities for Iranian supporters to attend matches" after the country's World Cup group-stage ticket allocation was revoked just days before the tournament.
